commit e409609efcc9f454bb53ca7cdf6b369d6ba975e2
Author: helmif <xihelmy@gmail.com>
Date:   Mon Apr 20 16:56:10 2026 +0700

    phase-4: git diff filter (context lines dropped, headers preserved)
    
    Compresses unified diff by dropping context lines (space-prefixed) and
    index hash lines. Keeps: diff --git headers, --- / +++ file lines, @@
    hunk headers, +/- change lines, new/deleted/renamed file metadata,
    Binary files notices. Unknown line → pass-through (zero-risk).
    
    7 real-output fixtures (clean, single, modified, multi, new, deleted,
    renamed, binary) captured from wafi repo via actual git commands.
    internal/filters coverage: 95.4%.
    
    Refs: ROADMAP.md Fase 4

commit 277e73e283a42e5f2e1958217b48fece2bf44bd5
Author: helmif <xihelmy@gmail.com>
Date:   Mon Apr 20 16:33:47 2026 +0700

    phase-3: git_status fixtures, golden tests, 96% filter coverage
    
    9 fixture scenarios (clean, dirty, staged, ahead, behind, diverged,
    detached, conflict, malformed) + 9 passthrough edge cases covering all
    bail-out paths. testutil.CheckGolden helper with -update flag.
    internal/filters coverage: 96.2% (target was >80%).
    
    Refs: ROADMAP.md Fase 3

commit 808412e9fb0b6af7a37288eaeebd17150b465cf8
Author: helmif <xihelmy@gmail.com>
Date:   Mon Apr 20 16:32:36 2026 +0700

    phase-2: filter interface, registry, SafeApply
    
    Split Filter interface + ApplyContext into filter.go; SafeApply adds
    panic recovery so a broken filter can never fail the user's command
    (zero-risk principle #2). Registry and Default() in registry.go.
    GitStatus Apply signature updated to new contract.
    
    Refs: ROADMAP.md Fase 2

commit 25579811e04141bac16759b9c860ae058017ac95
Author: helmif <xihelmy@gmail.com>
Date:   Mon Apr 20 16:32:16 2026 +0700

    phase-1: foundation (runner, stash, go.mod)
    
    Zero-dep subprocess runner with 10MB output cap and signal forwarding.
    Raw-output stash for filter fallback. Module renamed lean→wafi.
    
    Refs: ROADMAP.md Fase 1
